title.description: Title for the new resume (max 100 chars).

styleId.description: ResumeStyle for the copy. Defaults to the source resume style.

language.description: Language of the copy (e.g. pt-br, en). Defaults to the source language.

itemIds.description: Item ids of this section to copy. Omitted = every item.

include.description: Sections (and optionally which items) to copy from the source. Omitted = copy everything.

description: Snapshot-copy of an existing resume. The copy diverges from the source — later edits to either do not affect the other. Publish state (slug/isPublic) and stats are reset.
